name: software-qa-testing
description: Software QA testing methodology skill: test case generation, QA test reports, and bug reports classified by Severity and Priority.

interface.shortDescription: Generate code-driven test cases, QA reports, and structured bug reports.
interface.longDescription: A reusable QA workflow for Codex that designs test cases from source code, records execution results in a QA report, and turns failures into structured bug reports with Severity and Priority.
defaultPrompt: Generate test cases for this module.
Run a QA pass and report bugs.
Write a bug report from this failure.
